012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.mock;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.StateEnum.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.emptyIfNull;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
024import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
025
026import java.util.*;
027
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.util.*;
031
032/**
033 * Used to resolve incoming URLS to the various URL artifacts of <l>HttpServletRequest</l>.
034 *
035 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
036 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauRestMockBasics">juneau-rest-mock Basics</a>
037 * </ul>
038 */
039@SuppressWarnings({
040   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., PROP_contextPath)
041})
042public class MockPathResolver {
043
044   // Property name constants
045   private static final String PROP_contextPath = "contextPath";
046   private static final String PROP_error = "error";
047   private static final String PROP_remainder = "remainder";
048   private static final String PROP_servletPath = "servletPath";
049   private static final String PROP_target = "target";
050   private static final String PROP_uri = "uri";
051
052   private static String fixSegment(String s, Map<String,Object> pathVars) {
053      s = formatNamed(emptyIfNull(s), pathVars);
054      if (s.isEmpty() || s.equals("/"))
055         return "";
056      s = trimTrailingSlashes(s);
057      if (s.charAt(0) != '/')
058         s = '/' + s;
059      return s;
060
061   }
062
063   private String uri;
064   private String target;
065   private String contextPath;
066   private String servletPath;
067   private String remainder;
068
069   private String error;
070
071   /**
072    * Constructor.
073    *
074    * @param target
075    *    The target portion of the URL (e.g. <js>"http://localhost"</js>).
076    *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, <js>"http://localhost"</js> is assumed.
077    * @param contextPath
078    *    The context path of the servlet, or <jk>null</jk> if unknown or doesn't have one.
079    * @param servletPath
080    *    The servlet path of the servlet, or <jk>null</jk> if unknown or doesn't have one.
081    * @param pathToResolve
082    *    The path to resolve.
083    *    <br>Can be relative to servlet or an absolute path.
084    * @param pathVars
085    *    Optional path variables to resolve in the context path or servlet path.
086    */
087   public MockPathResolver(String target, String contextPath, String servletPath, String pathToResolve, Map<String,Object> pathVars) {
088      try {
089         init(target, contextPath, servletPath, pathToResolve, pathVars);
090      } catch (Exception e) {
091         error = lm(e);
092      }
093   }
094
095   /**
096    * Returns the context path of the URL.
097    *
098    * @return The context path of the URL always starting with <js>'/'</js>, or an empty string if it doesn't exist.
099    */
100   public String getContextPath() { return contextPath; }
101
102   /**
103    * Returns any parsing errors.
104    *
105    * @return Any parsing errors.
106    */
107   public String getError() { return error; }
108
109   /**
110    * Returns the remainder of the URL following the context and servlet paths.
111    *
112    * @return The remainder of the URL.
113    */
114   public String getRemainder() { return remainder; }
115
116   /**
117    * Returns the servlet path of the URL.
118    *
119    * @return The servlet path of the URL always starting with <js>'/'</js>, or an empty string if it doesn't exist.
120    */
121   public String getServletPath() { return servletPath; }
122
123   /**
124    * Returns just the hostname portion of the URL.
125    *
126    * @return The hostname portion of the URL.
127    */
128   public String getTarget() { return target; }
129
130   /**
131    * Returns the fully-qualified URL.
132    *
133    * @return The fully-qualified URL.
134    */
135   public String getURI() { return uri; }
136
137   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
138      // @formatter:off
139      return filteredBeanPropertyMap()
140         .a(PROP_contextPath, contextPath)
141         .a(PROP_error, error)
142         .a(PROP_remainder, remainder)
143         .a(PROP_servletPath, servletPath)
144         .a(PROP_target, target)
145         .a(PROP_uri, uri);
146      // @formatter:on
147   }
148
149   @Override
150   public String toString() {
151      return r(properties());
152   }
153
154   @SuppressWarnings({
155      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
156      "java:S6541", // Single-threaded context; synchronization unnecessary
157   })
158   private void init(String target, String contextPath, String servletPath, String pathToResolve, Map<String,Object> pathVars) {
159
160      target = trimTrailingSlashes(emptyIfNull(target));
161      if (target.isEmpty())
162         target = "http://localhost";
163
164      contextPath = fixSegment(contextPath, pathVars);
165      servletPath = fixSegment(servletPath, pathVars);
166      pathToResolve = emptyIfNull(pathToResolve);
167
168      if (! (pathToResolve.startsWith("http://") || pathToResolve.startsWith("https://"))) {
169         pathToResolve = fixSegment(pathToResolve, mape());
170         this.uri = target + contextPath + servletPath + pathToResolve;
171         this.target = target;
172         this.contextPath = contextPath;
173         this.servletPath = servletPath;
174         this.remainder = pathToResolve;
175         return;
176      }
177
178      // Path starts with http[s]: so we have to parse it to resolve variables.
179      this.uri = pathToResolve;
180
181      // S3 - Found "http://", looking for any character other than '/' (end of target).
182      // S4 - Found  any character, looking for 3rd '/' (end of target).
183      // S5 - Found 3rd '/', resolving contextPath.
184      // S6 - Resolved contextPath, resolving servletPath.
185      // S7 - Resolved servletPath.
186      StateEnum state = S3;
187
188      int cpSegments = countChars(contextPath, '/');
189      int spSegments = countChars(servletPath, '/');
190
191      this.contextPath = "";
192      this.servletPath = "";
193      this.remainder = "";
194
195      int mark = 0;
196      for (var i = uri.indexOf("://") + 3; i < uri.length(); i++) {
197         var c = uri.charAt(i);
198         if (state == S3) {
199            if (c != '/')
200               state = S4;
201            else
202               break;
203         } else if (state == S4) {
204            if (c == '/') {
205               this.target = uri.substring(0, i);
206               state = S5;
207               if (contextPath.isEmpty()) {
208                  state = S6;
209                  if (servletPath.isEmpty()) {
210                     state = S7;
211                  }
212               }
213               mark = i;
214            }
215         } else if (state == S5) {
216            if (c == '/') {
217               cpSegments--;
218               if (cpSegments == 0) {
219                  this.contextPath = uri.substring(mark, i);
220                  mark = i;
221                  state = S6;
222                  if (servletPath.isEmpty()) {
223                     state = S7;
224                  }
225               }
226            }
227         } else if (state == S6 && c == '/') {
228            spSegments--;
229            if (spSegments == 0) {
230               this.servletPath = uri.substring(mark, i);
231               mark = i;
232               state = S7;
233            }
234         }
235      }
236
237      if (state == S4) {
238         this.target = uri;
239      } else if (state == S5) {
240         this.contextPath = uri.substring(mark);
241      } else if (state == S6) {
242         this.servletPath = uri.substring(mark);
243      } else if (state == S7) {
244         this.remainder = uri.substring(mark);
245      } else {
246         throw rex("Invalid URI pattern encountered:  {0}", uri);
247      }
248
249      if (! contextPath.isEmpty()) {
250         var p = UrlPathMatcher.of(contextPath);
251         if (p.match(UrlPath.of(this.contextPath)) == null)
252            throw rex("Context path [{0}] not found in URI:  {1}", contextPath, uri);
253      }
254
255      if (! servletPath.isEmpty()) {
256         var p = UrlPathMatcher.of(servletPath);
257         if (p.match(UrlPath.of(this.servletPath)) == null)
258            throw rex("Servlet path [{0}] not found in URI:  {1}", servletPath, uri);
259      }
260   }
261}
